message:
fix(core): OverrideGuard drop behavior and must_use message

OverrideGuard::drop:
- Silently ignore empty stack instead of debug_assert panic
- This can legitimately occur when clear_all_overrides() is called
  while guards are still active, which is documented behavior
- Prevents unexpected panics in edge cases during cleanup

push_override:
- Add descriptive must_use message explaining guard semantics
- Change from bare #[must_use] to #[must_use = "explanation"]
- Clarifies that dropping the guard removes the override

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
